overall.description: A first-person perspective ride on a metro train through Night City in Cyberpunk 2077, beginning inside the train car with fellow passengers before transitioning to exterior views of industrial districts and dense neon-lit downtown skyscrapers, concluding as the train approaches a station.

events.description: camera pans right to reveal additional passengers including person with braided hair

agents.ego_description: sitting on metro train observing fellow passengers and passing scenery through windows

notable_agents.action: passenger with braided hair and headphones sitting on bench looking at device
passenger in yellow shirt and pink pants sitting with legs crossed

entered.detail: brown leather bench seating along train car walls
large rectangular windows showing passing cityscape
illuminated route information display above doors
red and white graffiti tags on interior walls

segments.scene_description: The scene opens inside a moving metro train car with sparse passengers seated on brown leather benches. The interior features artificial lighting, graffiti on walls, and digital route displays. The camera slowly pans right across the car, revealing passengers including one with braided hair and headphones and another in distinctive yellow and pink clothing.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial district viewed from elevated metro track

events.description: view transitions from train interior to exterior industrial landscape through window
passing industrial smokestacks with active flames and smoke plumes

agents.ego_description: viewing industrial cityscape from moving train window as it passes through factory district

entered.detail: tall factory chimneys with active flames at tops emitting smoke
massive industrial structures with corporate signage
network of electrical cables and transmission towers
flashing red safety lights along elevated track railings

segments.scene_description: The perspective shifts to an exterior view from the train window, revealing an industrial district with massive smokestacks, factory towers, and power lines against an overcast dusk sky. Red warning lights line the elevated track railings as the train moves past the industrial complex.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense cyberpunk downtown with neon advertisements and skyscrapers

events.description: transition from industrial zone to dense commercial downtown with glass skyscrapers
passing close to curved glass towers with prominent teal neon lighting
moving through urban canyon with multiple holographic billboards and elevated highways

agents.ego_description: traveling at high speed through dense urban canyon of neon-lit skyscrapers and elevated infrastructure

entered.detail: tall modern buildings with reflective glass facades and illuminated windows
large illuminated advertisements with pink and purple neon lighting
floating three-dimensional commercial holograms between buildings
multi-level highway interchanges and elevated roadways

segments.scene_description: The train enters the dense downtown core, surrounded by towering glass skyscrapers with teal neon accents and massive holographic advertisements. The environment shifts from industrial to high-tech commercial, with complex elevated highway systems visible between the buildings as the train moves through the urban canyon.

scene_state.functional_zone: metro station approach with close building proximity

events.description: train approaches station, passing extremely close to building walls and entering covered area
train slows as it enters station platform area with concrete walls passing by

agents.ego_description: train slowing down while approaching station platform, passing close to concrete walls and station infrastructure

entered.detail: smooth concrete station walls with horizontal teal light strips
concrete platform surface with safety markings
large vertical billboard with product advertisement on station wall

segments.scene_description: The train approaches its destination, passing extremely close to concrete station walls with teal accent lighting. The view becomes constrained as the train enters the station structure, with platform edges visible and the train slowing down. The open cityscape gives way to the enclosed station environment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that begins within the sterile interior of a metro train and transitions into a sweeping journey through a futuristic cityscape before entering a station. It begins inside the car, panning across graffiti-covered walls and passengers on leather benches under artificial light. As the perspective shifts through the window, the scene opens onto an industrial district filled with massive smokestacks and power lines beneath an overcast dusk sky. The environment then transforms into a dense urban canyon of towering glass skyscrapers and teal neon holograms, weaving through complex elevated highway systems. Finally, the open cityscape gives way to a constrained view as the train slows down, passing close to concrete walls with teal accents as it enters the enclosed station.
